battleTraits.name: Blood Rites
battleTraits.description: Cumulative buffs each round: Round 1: +1 to Run rolls. Round 2: +1 to Charge rolls. Round 3: +1 to Hit rolls. Round 4: +1 to Wound rolls.

regimentAbilities.name: All-Out Slaughter
regimentAbilities.description: Pick a friendly unit. Add +1 to Attacks characteristic of melee weapons until next turn.

regimentAbilities.name: Heartseekers
regimentAbilities.description: Units that did not move in the movement phase have Crit (5+) for melee weapons.
